title: Wellness and Health Services: Communicable Diseases
description: Conroe ISD follows specific guidelines for managing communicable diseases to help keep students, staff, and the broader school community safe and healthy. The policy outlines how the district identifies, responds to, and communicates about contagious illnesses, including when students may need to stay home or return to school. Parents and community members can use this policy to understand what steps the district takes to prevent the spread of illness in schools.
